0.text: Structural distortion and increased linear band density with volume loss in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Atelectasis in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Consolidation in the right upper lobe

3.text: Increased ground-glass opacity in the right upper lobe

4.text: Consolidation in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

5.text: Increased ground-glass opacity in the superior segment of the right lower lobe
